{{Infobox technique
| name = Soul Cloak
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Soul Cloak Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Soul Cloak is a specialized technique used by [[Lindon]] that manifests as a fluid, blue-white corona of energy. Created using insights from a specific book found in the [[Ninecloud Court]] [[library]], the technique allows him to channel [[pure madra]] through his body. This process provides significant enhancements to his physical capabilities, granting him superior speed, precision, and control over his movements. These attributes enable him to navigate difficult terrain, evade powerful attacks, and engage in high-speed combat. The Soul Cloak also serves various utility and defensive purposes. It can be used to facilitate rapid movement, such as leaping across distances or dodging strikes, and it assists in maintaining physical stability under external pressure. Additionally, the technique can be used to transmit messages via a dream [[construct]], provide wind barrier defenses, and incorporate [[scripts]] that weaken spiritual or [[madra]]-based attacks. It can also be used to direct energy toward other entities, such as [[Dross]], or to power external items like shields. While highly effective for movement and combat agility, the cloak requires the expenditure of [[madra]] and can be used in conjunction with [[soulfire]] to enhance its effects.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] developed and named a new technique known as the Soul Cloak. This ability functions by swirling around the user, allowing their strength to be held in reserve until it is required while making all movements feel smooth and easy. [[Lindon]] utilized the technique to successfully climb a cliff.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] named a new technique 'The [[Soul Cloak]]'.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Soul Cloak]] technique allows strength to wait until needed and makes movements smooth and easy.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Soul Cloak]] is a technique that swirls around the user.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Soul Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] used the [[Soul Cloak]] to climb a cliff.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Soul Cloak]] is a fluid blue-white light.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Soul Cloak]] allows [[Lindon]] to feel his [[Truegold]] [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Soul Cloak]] sprung up around [[Lindon]] as he ran.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Soul Cloak]] was used by [[Lindon]] when he was a [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Soul Cloak manifests as a blue-white haze of energy. During his use of the [[Empty Palm]], [[Lindon]] attempted to localize this energy to his arm before successfully kindling it. This technique provides the user with enhanced speed, grace, strength, and control over their movements and [[Underlord body]]. [[Lindon]] utilized the cloak to slip aside an attack and to change his personal movement style.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Soul Cloak]] is a blue-white haze of energy.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] attempted to localize the [[Soul Cloak]] to his arm while using the [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] kindled the [[Soul Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Soul Cloak]] provides control over movements and the [[Underlord body]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[Soul Cloak]] to slip aside an attack.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Soul Cloak]] is a technique that provides speed and grace.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Soul Cloak]] provides strength and control.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[Soul Cloak]] to change his movement style.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|To accommodate the adoption of [[Hollow King]] [[madra]], [[Lindon]] realized he would need to either abandon or fundamentally rework his Soul Cloak. By applying concepts from [[The Seven Principles of Pure Madra]], he successfully developed the technique into a blue-white [[aura]]. This ability allows [[Lindon]] to build a shroud around himself or use the energy to leap across a room. During certain applications of the technique, the Soul Cloak has been known to rise up around him.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] would have to abandon or re-work the [[Soul Cloak]] to adopt [[Hollow King]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] used ideas from [[The Seven Principles of Pure Madra]] to create the [[Soul Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Soul Cloak]] is a technique [[Lindon]] uses to leap across the room.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Soul Cloak]] is a blue-white [[aura]]/technique used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Soul Cloak]] is a technique [[Lindon]] can build around himself.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[Soul Cloak]] rose up.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Soul Cloak]] allows [[Lindon]] to run at full speed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Soul Cloak]] sprang up around [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] can accelerate herself with the [[Soul Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used the [[Soul Cloak]] to propel himself after a spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soul Cloak]] is economical to use even while sparing [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used the [[Soul Cloak]] to defend against an axe.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Suggested by [[Dross]], the Soul Cloak is a technique that manifests as smooth, blue-white flames covering the user's entire body. This ability is powered by [[Lindon's madra]] and provides immense physical strength, once allowing him to catch a gigantic claw. The technique can be utilized for various combat applications, such as when [[Lindon]] delivered a punch enhanced by its power. Additionally, [[Little Blue]] has employed the Soul Cloak to catch incoming blows.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] caught a gigantic claw with the strength of the [[Soul Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soul Cloak]] is a technique that manifests as a smooth, blue-white flame from the user's whole body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Soul Cloak]] is a technique suggested by [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used a [[Soul Cloak]]-powered punch.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] used the [[Soul Cloak]] to catch blows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Soul Cloak]] can be powered by [[Lindon's madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
